AiR.TV · Design Direction v1

10 screens · 1920×1080 · LIGHT theme primary RACELAB sponsor anchor
10 pilot screens.

Off-white canvas built for Vegas casino sportsbook displays. Racing red brand, dark navy header/footer, oversized type, RACELAB anchored as the in-house cross-sell. Anton + Inter + JetBrains Mono (all free). Same design system across every screen.
001Individual Runner 002Live Race · vision + leaders 003Next To Go · schedule 004Top Rated · career 005Speed Map 006Projected Top 6 007Jackpot · Pick 6 008Live Update · jockey 009Race Result · dividends 010Track Live · positions
001Individual Runner · Profilerunner board + featured profile + form + ratings
002Live Race · Vision + Lower Thirdlive vision area · leaders ribbon · live pool
003Next To Go · Schedulemulti-track schedule grid · urgency tiers · delayed state
004Top Rated · CareerRACELAB best overall career rating · leaderboard 2×2
005Speed Mapprojected early-speed positioning · 10k sims · top 4 list
006Projected Top 6RACELAB engine · win probability · 3×2 card grid
007Jackpot · Pick 6hero pool number · live legs sidebar · next-leg alert
008Live Update · Jockey Spotlightnarrative story card · next-ride card · combo form
009Race Result · Dividendspodium · dividends · sectional timing strip
010Track Live · Live PositioningSVG track diagram with horses · live order · pace data
DARK theme reference — for ops console / mobile / in-app use. Same design system, charcoal canvas + electric mint.
001 · DIndividual Runner · DARKreference
003 · DNext To Go · DARKreference
AiR.TV · designed by Kev · 2026-06-12 v1 · 10 light · 2 dark reference
